headline: Sempra Infrastructure Names Bhavesh "Bob" Patel Incoming Chief Executive Officer
summary: Sempra Infrastructure, a subsidiary of Sempra (NYSE: SRE), today announced that Bhavesh "Bob" Patel has been named incoming chief executive officer. He will assume this role upon the closing of a KKR-led consortium's previously announced acquisition of a majority ownership interest in the company. Patel will also join Sempra Infrastructure's board of directors. Justin Bird will continue to serve as chairman of the board of directors and chief executive officer of Sempra Infrastructure through th
